title: neanotis lancifolia
intro: Neanotis lancifolia, also known as the slender lip orchid, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Neanotis lancifolia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
